mapper.sql: mb.id, mb.user_id, mb.content, mb.is_anonymous, mb.create_time, mb.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, COALESCE(comment_count.count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_comment GROUP BY message_id ) comment_count ON mb.id = comment_count.message_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_like GROUP BY message_id ) like_count ON mb.id = like_count.message_id WHERE mb.id = #{id}

SELECT , CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, COALESCE(comment_count.count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_comment GROUP BY message_id ) comment_count ON mb.id = comment_count.message_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_like GROUP BY message_id ) like_count ON mb.id = like_count.message_id ORDER BY mb.create_time DESC

SELECT , CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, COALESCE(comment_count.count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_comment GROUP BY message_id ) comment_count ON mb.id = comment_count.message_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_like GROUP BY message_id ) like_count ON mb.id = like_count.message_id ORDER BY mb.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT , CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, COALESCE(comment_count.count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_comment GROUP BY message_id ) comment_count ON mb.id = comment_count.message_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_like GROUP BY message_id ) like_count ON mb.id = like_count.message_id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND mb.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{content}, '%')
ORDER BY mb.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_board mb
AND mb.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{content}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND mb.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{content}, '%')

SELECT , CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mb.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, COALESCE(comment_count.count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_board mb LEFT JOIN user u ON mb.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_comment GROUP BY message_id ) comment_count ON mb.id = comment_count.message_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT message_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message_like GROUP BY message_id ) like_count ON mb.id = like_count.message_id WHERE mb.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY mb.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_board (user_id, content, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{isAnonymous})
